purpose: Fixes queuing commands when HCI_UNREGISTER is set to prevent use-after-free, addressing a bug and improving robustness.
Removes an unnecessary header include in n_hdlc.c to simplify code structure.
Updates documentation to reflect changes in store metric reporting.
Fixes race conditions and improper vma lock handling during split and unmapping in hugetlb. Ensures correct allocation and freeing of locks to prevent issues like double freeing.
Adds documentation for AVDD and MICVDD supplies in rt5682s codec device tree bindings.
Fixes a resource leak by adding missing iounmap() in remove function.
Removes an unused 'work' field from struct mlx5e_async_ctx, which is part of kTLS in the net/mlx5e module.
Changes key_idx to signed to prevent static checker warnings when -1 is assigned.
The commit sorts CONFIG_SURFACE_PLATFORMS in defconfigs without any functional changes.
Refactors code by replacing an open-coded check with a function call to mcp251xfd_is_fd_mode(), improving maintainability.
The commit modifies self-tests to skip RTC tests when the hardware isn't present, preventing unnecessary failures.
Removes redundant assignment of variable 'bytes' which was causing a clang warning about dead code, improving code quality.
Decouples rcuscale from RCU Tasks to reduce kernel size and tracing complexity.
Removes a duplicated string in spte.h to improve code quality.
Reverts a change that caused issues with dcfclk-based clock tables, preventing underflow by reverting until a proper fix is implemented.
Adds compatible string for Renesas RZ/V2L SoC with Mali-G31 GPU to device tree bindings.
The commit renames a struct to follow a consistent naming convention within the driver.
Fixes a clang -Wformat warning in the AMD xgbe driver by correcting format specifier to match promoted type.
Fixes a bug in MIPS jump_label by adjusting branch range checks.
Removes HW_VAR_H2C_FW_P2P_PS_OFFLOAD case from SetHwReg8188EU() and calls the function directly, simplifying the code as part of removing unwanted HAL layer.
The commit addresses sparse warnings by declaring non-global symbols as static in cpu_errata.c.
Removes incorrect interrupt flags from MDSS nodes in device tree bindings.
Allocates space for arrays in struct ctrl_ref to allow dynamic resizing by drivers.
Adds support for specific SoCs and PMICs to the socinfo driver.
The commit updates the WiFi driver to recognize all possible chip versions (A-P) instead of marking some as unknown.
Removes custom enable count from ux500 PRCMU clocks since core already tracks it.

The commit aims to reduce the usage of #ifdef CONFIG_XIP_KERNEL by organizing and grouping related preprocessor directives. It focuses on improving code structure without introducing new functionality or fixing bugs.
Enables QUP and GPI DMA hardware to support future addition of I2C nodes.
This commit improves code readability by fixing comments, correcting a typo, and adjusting coding style.
Fixes an infinite loop caused by failed HW semaphore acquisition when hardware is removed.
Updates the pcm3168a driver to use modern ASoC DAI terminology, improving code readability and consistency.
Removes redundant IS_SWAPFILE check since it's always defined, simplifying code.
Implements GTP echo response to comply with GTP specification by sending GTP_ECHO_RSP for incoming Echo Requests.
Refactor cpumask functions to use more efficient alternatives.
Removes an obsolete firmware call causing console errors during STA roaming.
Adds board config adl_rt5682 for alc5682 codec without amplifier, connects to SSP0.
The commit ensures that zerocopy sendmsg requests fail when the underlying socket protocol does not support them, correcting previous incorrect handling.
The commit modifies the kerneldoc-preamble to conditionally load xeCJK.sty only if it exists, preventing errors on systems where texlive-xecjk is not properly packaged.
The commit modifies checkpatch to stop reporting errors for certain macros used in kernel drivers.
Converts simpledrm to use regular atomic helpers for better code structure, allowing easier code sharing among drivers with no functional changes.
Adds jpeg decode worker interface for parallel HW operation on MT8195.
Removes unnecessary VPRINTK() calls and ata_scsi_dump_cdb() as tracepoints provide equivalent information.
Adds support for entering zstate during extended vblank in FreeSync mode to save power.
Fixes type mismatch in hqd_destroy() callback causing CFI failure.
Corrects the device tree binding property name from 'reset' to 'resets' and adds missing 'additionalProperties: false'.
The commit silences an array-bounds warning in GCC 12 by adjusting warning levels.
Replaces pm_runtime_get_sync with pm_runtime_resume_and_get to simplify code.
Refactors io_uring by moving fixed file handling to appropriate location and improving context handling.
Updates device tree bindings to split G1 and G2 decoder blocks into separate nodes with independent power-domain control.
The commit removes a redundant macro used only once to simplify the code.
